defaultLines: Please go back and get rid of Arachnae
Hold there, stanger. Who are you?
You've made some tremendous changes in these parts.
We're wise to your kind's tricks. Present yourself to the Warden or taste steel.
The Warden must approve all outsiders.
And so are you, that don't mean we're friends.
I was born here.
Don't know nothing about no hordes.
You either check in with the Warden or off with you.
Although the Warden will no doubt send you on your way.
We're not looking for your kind of trouble.
Oh, glorious gods! Just what we don't need, more outsiders…
Well, stranger, I'm surprised. You've done our fair town a service.
The bandits say they're soldiers from your homeland.
You claim to be from some kingdom across the sea.
I don't know any kings, but these other men said the same.
No, no, we're doing just fine.
Except for looters and raiders from across the sea.
Apparently from your kingdom.
Which I'll answer once you take care of your fellow bandits.
Well, they are, and they're from your land.
You've returned? So perhaps you aren't like the others.
I sent your friends from Wolf's End to Cemetery Hill. They can settle there if they like.
There's no room for you Wolf's End folk here.
My people settled here 40 years ago.
We came from a far, far land, where we were slaves.
Now we live free and prosperous lives.
We protect our own.
I sent your friends from Wolf's End to Cemetery Hill.
If they're looking for new lands to settle, they can have those.
Beggars can't be choosers.
No one else will trade with the Gnoles.
But I remember when they weren't so bad.
I can't imagine why they're so angry now!
The bandit camp was just back the other way
These bandits never bothered us before. Did you rile them up?
The Steward went into that cave to prepare for the Harvest Ritual.
You shouldn't disturb the Steward.
I think so.
Only the Steward knows how it works.
The Steward has long protected our people, ever since we came here.
Well, he's in there.
But don't bother him if he seems too busy.
He's doing important work.
Time for a lesson?
Please go back and get rid of Arachnae
You're a better class of hero
One we need badly
The dead of Cemetery Hill are rising
Bandits still plague us
And we live in the shadow of Castle Hocke
That fortress was shut to us years ago
But the evil that shut it still pervades this land
Have you seen the Steward yet.
You've changed this land for the better.
But I fear our troubles have just begun.
We've had our fill of looters and bandits.
You behave, stranger.
Stranger, I know your type. We've no patience for you here.
I don't know you, but you'd best be on your way.
Your king has nothing to do with us.
And we've had plenty of bandits say the same story.
I don't want trouble, so go onto the woods with the others.
Aye, you'll find plenty of your kind there.
So you say.
I'll believe it when I see it.
The Steward isn't here right now, stranger.
You're back.
Only The Steward knows how the magical shield works.
That shield is our main protection against our enemies.
I don't know, that's his doing.
But he's kept us mostly safe for years.
A few people disappear every year, but not much.
The Steward is gathering material for the Harvest Ritual.
Go talk to his bodyguard Gunter if you want to find him.
You say the Steward worships dark powers?
I had no idea!
Right over there, off the town square.
Hurry, you've got to find out who else is helping him.
The Steward, making pacts with evil gods...
I never imagined it.
With the Steward's evil unveiled, we have a lot to figure out.
According to the Steward's journal, his cult took sacrifices to the mountain peak.
There's a chance the Cult left survivors on the mountain.
I'm sending some of my people to investigate.
Then meet my people in the mountains.
But tread lightly, we don't know what's up there.
You've returned once again. Whatever you did out there, it's done something here.
Thank you for everything you have done here!
By destroying Meylour, you've left the path to the Sleeping Lands unblocked.
With Meylour's barrier gone, the path to the castle is open.
My people came up from there decades ago.
We were fleeing a life of slavery in The Sleeping Lands.
The Dragons and Goblins kept us in chains.
There's no knowing what's there now.
Meylour's barrier kept the Sleeping Lands locked away from this world.
The magic barrier that sealed Castle Hocke is dispelled.
Another stranger...
We've no room for strangers here.
None of your concern, stranger.
There are people living south of the swamp?
Amazing, I didn't even know there were other humans.
I grew up here.
It's the best place in the world.
The woods are full of bandits.
But they'd never come here.
Here for the harvest festival?
The Steward makes sure every year is better than the last.
That man works wonders.
Don't even know why we need a Warden.
The Gnoles never come into town.
But they'll attack if you leave the city limits.
An outsider! Wow!
I wish my brother Karl were here.
He ran away last harvest.
But he always said there were other people.
And he was right.
Guess the Steward don't know all.
Who are you?
I've never seen someone from outside the town.
Are you allowed to be here?
Gnoles and bandits out there.
Stay alert.
Stranger.
What are you selling?
Protection services?
Proven remedies?
Magic beans?
We've had our fill of strangers.
Let me guess...
You're a thief?
Or maybe a charlatan?
I know!
You're a #tc#.
Even worse.
Have a care! Did I restore the Dreadfold Gate so you could stumble to your doom?
Long ago, the wizard Caphrax sundered the world into two time-rivers
The two branches are close but separated
Into one branch the wizard channeled the dread magic of the Sleeping Lands, creating The Dreadfold
Yes, a dark, magic-drenched mirror of our world lies through this gate
Are you mad? Only a battle-hardened team of adventurers stands any chance through that gate
I'd suggest you master the perils of this world first
Our harvest festival begins soon!
It's my favorite time of year.
Although something sad always happens too.
My nephew disappeared last festival.
My daughter disappeared ten years back.
Still, it's a happy time!
Felbridge is a nice place.
We don't need outsiders messing things up.

Marshal Sythokahn is defeated, not just his dream this time.
You've stopped the dragons from invading again.
But who knows what else is down there.
Our leader, Titus, went to the Observatory looking for some way to fight the dragons.
Thank you for slaying that dragon.
We were with Sigismund Hocke's expedition.
Yes, the very same.
We fought through the goblins and into the castle.
Sigismund left us to guard the camp.
He and his knights went down below.
They passed through the portal.
The Sage Titus helped us.
When the dragon legion came, he went to find a way to stop them.
You should find find him.
How is it you see me?
Nephit seeks an ancient ritual from the Aetheric Observatory.
When we were both alive, he asked for it.
I never trusted him with such power.
It contacts terrible, ancient gods.
I don't know, but it's a bad idea.
A really, really bad idea.
Terrible idea.
Stop Nephit from using the ritual.
Nephit materialized on the ramparts after you fought him.
I take it Nephit found the ritual?
I don't know why, but he's going to use it.
Maybe he hopes it will restore him to life.
Maybe, but it would be a monstrous existence.
Hurry now, stop him before he can find out.
Hurry! Nephit went this way!
Beyond lies the portal to the Sleeping Lands
Baron Hocke's sages created a powerful Capstone to seal the portal.
It limits the travel between worlds.
Nephit will try and break the Capstone and use its energy for his ritual.
Travel between the realms will be unstoppable.
Assuming Nephit's ritual doesn't kill us all.
He's headed towards the Capstone!
At least, Nephit is no more.
It's coming
Everything
Riches and Nightmares
Monsters and Magic
Good and Evil
It's all down there, and it's all awake now
Nephit is defeated, but the Capstone is destroyed. The link to the Sleeping Lands lies open
What are the Sleeping Lands?
Ha, you are still an adventurer
You are going down there, aren't you?
Well, then, I will accompany you
That gate should take us there
Or else tear us to pieces
These dragon-soldiers came up from below!
I'll explain later!
Hurry, we need help in the courtyard!
Thank you valiant hero, for slaying the dragon!
We were hiding here for so long.
Then the dragon warriors came from below.
They took control of the Dread Paladins.
So many Tuatara soldiers, can you trim their numbers?
They are all over the castle
They came from below
Thank you, maybe we can finally rebuild here.
Thanks, I already feel safer here.
There is a secret door in the throne room that leads to the cave
Some of the dragon's soldiers are holed up down there.
Be careful, they have one of Baron Hocke's golems at their command.
The Dread Paladin masks are the secret to controlling these golems.
The dragon general took control of the Dread Paladin Golems.
They used to be Baron Hocke's private bodyguard.
Their masks are the key to controlling them.
If you bring me any you find, perhaps I can restore control.
Thanks, I will get started on deconstructing these right away.
Thanks again for gathering the masks.

But who knows what else is down there.

Thanks again for gathering the masks.
Have you seen Wildbark? She left our tree headed west
Thank you, and thank Wildbark for sending you!
Thank you for helping our people!
Meylour's corrupted Dryads have infested the Ur-Tree!
Meylour's fiends drove us from the tree.
His corrupted plants and flames are everywhere.
You must hurry, I smell smoke!
Thank you, but the tree isn't safe yet.
Meylour's abominations tunneled in from the roots.
The Priests of Meylour will just send more fire.
They burrowed here from their temples.
Meylour wants everything dead. Everything.
Head to the ancient temple and defeat the Meylour's cultists
The priests of Meylour are preparing yet another ritual.
You need to find a way to Meylour's Heart.
It is where Meylour's power lies.
Only his priests know its location.
The Cult of Meylour is almost defeated!
The last of Meylour's cult cowers in fear.
You've almost beaten them.
Now you can finally strike down Meylour forever.
Meylour's followers got what they deserved.
Meylour will not rest until all life in Ellyria burns.
The Meylour ritual is disrupted?
Meylour's foul magic leaves a trace.
The cult tried to unleash his power.
Now I can help you follow that power to its source.
Follow the trail deep into the mountain's heart.
There you'll find Meylour.
Meylour's secrets are in Stormshard Mountain.
You must be a powerful hero to have come through the mines!
Thank you for reuniting our people!
Meylour's Ashen Dryads are besieging the Ur-Tree!
One of Meylour's Ashen Dryads fled to the East.
I take it he was running from you?
The Living Mountain has already destroyed most of my kind.
Follow that Ashen Dryad.
Capturing him will reveal more of Meylour's plans.
Help us gather the Dark Totems from the Ashen Dryads
You can find them on the Ashen Dryads
We need them for a protection from fire spell.
Perfect, I'll get the protection spell started.
We also need Meylour's Masks for the protection spell
Please hurry, the priests attacks need to be repelled.
Just what we needed. Thank you!
We should be protected now. Thanks again!
Can you help us put out the fires plaguing our land?
Living fire is everywhere, please destroy it.
Thank you. I can breath better already.
Hopefully our land will grow green once more!
This used to be a paradise.
You're not from around here, are you?
It might not look like much, but it'll get you across the lake
No charge. I actually enjoy the exercise
The Temple Isle is peaceful, even with all that is going on
Heading Over?
Heading back already?
I'll bet you have some wild stories to tell
Did you hear that?
I'll be right here when you are ready to go back to the city
With everything that has been going on...
It's just better to keep off the streets
Hello, young man|lady
The Emperor sold his soul to the Seelie to secure his throne.
The Seelie were the first to awake in the Sleeping Lands.
They were once wise and generous…
But time made them cruel and jealous of others.
They lost power to the Goblins and Dragons…
Sigismund Hocke turned to them to help defeat the Goblin Kings.
And now they prop up his rule in Valhaven.
It takes Seelie magic to counter Seelie magic.
Go to the Temple of Lost Dreams...
There you might find something I can use to counter the Emperor's wards.
Sounds like the Temple was more dangerous than suspected.
The Emperor must have been protecting his secrets well.
Now I know a great deal more about his Seelie magic.
I should be able to get you past the outer wards of his palace.
But you will be on your own when you face him.
He is vulnerable, but still very dangerous.
You have left your mark on the Sleeping Lands.
Now you are a part of the fate of The Sleeping Lands.
Your actions reverberate through the world of dreams.
If you dare face your fate…
You can enter the Primal Dream and learn the truth.
The truth about yourself and your place in the world.
You have returned. I hope you learned much.
It seems a dragon was hiding in your dreams.
You will find many strange things are possible.
You have seen but a sliver of the Sleeping Lands.
You'll be lucky if that's your only problem.
This world knows you now.
And I'm not sure it means you well.
Now that you can get past the Seelie wards, it's time to strike.
Before confronting The Emperor, we need to weaken him.
Take out all his support before you confront him.
His daughters command his army and secret police.
You can find them in the East and West wings of the palace.
You also need to defeat the Imperial Guard Commander.
He lives in the barracks.
Now The Emperor's defenses are in disarray.
The time to strike has come!
You never fail to impress, #tn#.
It is a tragedy what the Emperor has done here, but all is not lost
I can feel the city crying out from beneath the weight of Seelie filth that has tainted it.
As venom is key to making anti-venom, demon tears are key to cleanse Valhaven's aura.
Bless you, friend.
I will begin the long process of setting things right…
It gladens my heart to meet a noble soul such as you
You must be the Traveller Rathbone spoke of. Welcome.
The Emperor knows your name and want you dead.
I wonder what you did to earn his wrath?
That could not have pleased him.
But he would never admit to scheming against Shazari.
And he has put a public price on your head.
His son, the High Mage, will know the truth.
He seems to be out of favor with his father.
Find him while he's outside the palace and he might talk.
He frequents the alleys, cultivating thieves to his cause.
So, the Emperor is from your world!
His origins were always a mystery.
He overthrew the Goblins and set himself up ten years ago.
Thanks to his Seelie allies, he's been unstoppable.
I can sense you're destined to do great things here
Work with Mab to find a chink in the Emperor's armor
Now we need Ma Mab's help figuring out what to do next.
Sigismund Hocke became Emperor thanks to the Seelie.
Their dark magicks protect him and secure his throne.
We need a counter to their wards.
Ma Mab knows more about Seelie than anyone I know.
Talk to her and see if she has any ideas.
The Vermyn gangs helped The Emperor overthrow the Goblins.
I see now why the Emperor hates you.
Do you? You took his Barony.
Well, he's angered people here too.
The Vermyn gangs chafe under the Emperor's rule.
They would rise up against him…
Except the Gutter Lord remains loyal to the Emperor.
Go down and take out the Gutter Lord.
Then the Vermyn will join us for sure.
The Vermyn gangs are in an uproar!
With the Gutter Lord gone, some are already on our side.
Now for the hard part.
The Emperor cowers in his palace.
You've taken out all his support.
The people rally against him.
Emperor Sigismund's reign of terror ends today.
Liberty!
What you have done here…
I cannot thank you enough
Valhaven is free for the first time in centuries.
Goblins, Dragons, and Seelie are all defeated.
At last we shall know peace.
If you hadn't stopped the gang leaders,, I'd be dead.
This city's gangs are mostly human and are loyal to the Emperor.
But I hear from Skitts they might be won over.
Humans usually support The Emperor.
But he relies too much on The Seelie now.
The human gangs will fight him…
If we can knock out their leaders.
But I don't know who the leaders are.
My contact Skitts will know.
Go see what he suggests.
I used to be an Imperial…
Back before the Emperor lost his mind and started associating with Seelie.
I followed my conscience and it cost me everything.
Now I watch them terrorize these streets we used to protect.
I'll pay for any Imperial you take off the streets.
That's so many…Take this.
That's all the money I had left
No, Take it. You are fighting for a cause that is just
I'd trade all the gold in the world for things to return to the way they were
I guess the time for that has passed
Things will never be the same again.
The Imperials are bad enough, but the gangs are the worst kinds of opportunists.
They are running a protection and extortion racket.
Preying off innocent civilians that can't defend themselves.
I think it's time someone showed them that their days are finished.
Thank you traveler.
That is one less threat the people have to worry about.
The human gangs here have high standards.
You got the Vermyn gangs on your side...
That's impressive.
But the human gangs are different.
If you want to get close to the leaders…
You're going to have to prove yourself to them.
Be ready for a brutal fight.
They'll gang up on you in that fighting pit.
Everyone's talkin' about you now, #tn#.
It was a trick! They're onto you and your rebel friends!
The gang leaders set us up.
While you were in the ring, they were on the move.
The gangs are heading for the rebel hideout.
You have to hurry back…
Cut them off before they kill Odryn!
So you're the troublemaker, eh?
What's that?! Yep! They've robbed meh blind!
Vermyn raided mah garden and stole mah mushrooms.
I use those mushrooms to make stew and mah hearty mushroom pie.
With all this Imperial nonsense, people on the streets need mah shrooms to get by!
I don't wanna see anyone starve, do you?
Hoo-yeah! You found mah shrooms!
Now I can go back to baking mushroom pie
And Mushroom Gumbo
And Mushroom Stew
And Mushroom Soufflé
And Stuffed Mushroom Saffron Surprise
And Mushroom ala Kelp
And, let's see. I know there's more I can make with shrooms
You're not from around here, are you?
It might not look like much, but it'll get you across the lake
No charge. I actually enjoy the exercise
The Temple Isle is peaceful, even with all that is going on
Heading Over?
Heading back already?
I'll bet you have some wild stories to tell
Did you hear that?
I'll be right here when you are ready to go back to the city

It's just better to keep off the streets

Sigismund Hocke turned to them to help defeat the Goblin Kings.
And now they prop up his rule in Valhaven.
It takes Seelie magic to counter Seelie magic.
Go to the Temple of Lost Dreams...
There you might find something I can use to counter the Emperor's wards.
Sounds like the Temple was more dangerous than suspected.
The Emperor must have been protecting his secrets well.
Now I know a great deal more about his Seelie magic.
I should be able to get you past the outer wards of his palace.
But you will be on your own when you face him.
He is vulnerable, but still very dangerous.
You have left your mark on the Sleeping Lands.
Now you are a part of the fate of The Sleeping Lands.
Your actions reverberate through the world of dreams.
If you dare face your fate…
You can enter the Primal Dream and learn the truth.
The truth about yourself and your place in the world.
You have returned. I hope you learned much.
It seems a dragon was hiding in your dreams.
You will find many strange things are possible.
You have seen but a sliver of the Sleeping Lands.
You'll be lucky if that's your only problem.
This world knows you now.
And I'm not sure it means you well.
Now that you can get past the Seelie wards, it's time to strike.
Before confronting The Emperor, we need to weaken him.
Take out all his support before you confront him.
His daughters command his army and secret police.
You can find them in the East and West wings of the palace.
You also need to defeat the Imperial Guard Commander.
He lives in the barracks.
Now The Emperor's defenses are in disarray.
The time to strike has come!
You never fail to impress, #tn#.
It is a tragedy what the Emperor has done here, but all is not lost
I can feel the city crying out from beneath the weight of Seelie filth that has tainted it.
As venom is key to making anti-venom, demon tears are key to cleanse Valhaven's aura.
Bless you, friend.
I will begin the long process of setting things right…
It gladens my heart to meet a noble soul such as you
You must be the Traveller Rathbone spoke of. Welcome.
The Emperor knows your name and want you dead.
I wonder what you did to earn his wrath?
That could not have pleased him.
But he would never admit to scheming against Shazari.
And he has put a public price on your head.
His son, the High Mage, will know the truth.
He seems to be out of favor with his father.
Find him while he's outside the palace and he might talk.
He frequents the alleys, cultivating thieves to his cause.
So, the Emperor is from your world!
His origins were always a mystery.
He overthrew the Goblins and set himself up ten years ago.
Thanks to his Seelie allies, he's been unstoppable.
I can sense you're destined to do great things here
Work with Mab to find a chink in the Emperor's armor
Now we need Ma Mab's help figuring out what to do next.
Sigismund Hocke became Emperor thanks to the Seelie.
Their dark magicks protect him and secure his throne.
We need a counter to their wards.
Ma Mab knows more about Seelie than anyone I know.
Talk to her and see if she has any ideas.
The Vermyn gangs helped The Emperor overthrow the Goblins.
I see now why the Emperor hates you.
Do you? You took his Barony.
Well, he's angered people here too.
The Vermyn gangs chafe under the Emperor's rule.
They would rise up against him…
Except the Gutter Lord remains loyal to the Emperor.
Go down and take out the Gutter Lord.
Then the Vermyn will join us for sure.
The Vermyn gangs are in an uproar!
With the Gutter Lord gone, some are already on our side.
Now for the hard part.
The Emperor cowers in his palace.
You've taken out all his support.
The people rally against him.
Emperor Sigismund's reign of terror ends today.
Liberty!
What you have done here…
I cannot thank you enough
Valhaven is free for the first time in centuries.
Goblins, Dragons, and Seelie are all defeated.
At last we shall know peace.
If you hadn't stopped the gang leaders,, I'd be dead.
This city's gangs are mostly human and are loyal to the Emperor.
But I hear from Skitts they might be won over.
Humans usually support The Emperor.
But he relies too much on The Seelie now.
The human gangs will fight him…
If we can knock out their leaders.
But I don't know who the leaders are.
My contact Skitts will know.
Go see what he suggests.
I used to be an Imperial…
Back before the Emperor lost his mind and started associating with Seelie.
I followed my conscience and it cost me everything.
Now I watch them terrorize these streets we used to protect.
I'll pay for any Imperial you take off the streets.
That's so many…Take this.
That's all the money I had left
No, Take it. You are fighting for a cause that is just
I'd trade all the gold in the world for things to return to the way they were
I guess the time for that has passed
Things will never be the same again.
The Imperials are bad enough, but the gangs are the worst kinds of opportunists.
They are running a protection and extortion racket.
Preying off innocent civilians that can't defend themselves.
I think it's time someone showed them that their days are finished.
Thank you traveler.
That is one less threat the people have to worry about.
The human gangs here have high standards.
You got the Vermyn gangs on your side...
That's impressive.
But the human gangs are different.
If you want to get close to the leaders…
You're going to have to prove yourself to them.
Be ready for a brutal fight.
They'll gang up on you in that fighting pit.
Everyone's talkin' about you now, #tn#.
It was a trick! They're onto you and your rebel friends!
The gang leaders set us up.
While you were in the ring, they were on the move.
The gangs are heading for the rebel hideout.
You have to hurry back…
Cut them off before they kill Odryn!
So you're the troublemaker, eh?
What's that?! Yep! They've robbed meh blind!
Vermyn raided mah garden and stole mah mushrooms.
I use those mushrooms to make stew and mah hearty mushroom pie.
With all this Imperial nonsense, people on the streets need mah shrooms to get by!
I don't wanna see anyone starve, do you?
Hoo-yeah! You found mah shrooms!
Now I can go back to baking mushroom pie
And Mushroom Gumbo
And Mushroom Stew
And Mushroom Soufflé
And Stuffed Mushroom Saffron Surprise
And Mushroom ala Kelp
And, let's see. I know there's more I can make with shrooms
Thank you for freeing me!
Our fighters need their leader.
Someone named 'Nephit' is trying to control the goblins.
My father read through the old reports from when we landed 50 years ago.
There is another tomb. Maybe what Nephit sought is in there.
Help! Break me out of these chains!
Who are you, anyway?
You're not from around here.
Thanks! We haven't had goblins in over a year.
I know where the Goblin Chief's camp is.
The goblins are hiding on the other side of the forest.
Hiding, like I said.
The goblins are running scared.
But there are way more of them than we can handle.
Especially with all these undead suddenly rising up.
Head through the woods and follow the river.
You'll find your fill of goblins there.
Once you finish I'll catch up.
My new house is finished, you should come to dinner.
I built a new house by the waterfall.
Yes! But I cleaned out all the goblin nastiness.
Come on over whenever.
It's going to take weeks to get rid of these weeds.
Where did the devourers come from?@There was some stranger there.
Sounds like someone’s raiding Hsalt’s secret labs.
You've saved us!
We need to find that village.
You can find the village on the map.
Just head east and you'll find it.
I'll try to repair the Niobe.
Are you friend or foe?
Do you bring message from our friends in Sark?
We cannot trust strangers.
Did the King really send you?
I didn't know there was a king.
I didn't know there were other humans besides us.
I thought it was all made up.
There are goblin raiders holed up in that farm.
We've got the trogs cornered.
You've got the goblins on the run.
As long as we keep up the pressure...
We can reclaim this land.
But they've got some tough commander in there.
If you take care of him, I can hold the line here.
You showed him!
We can keep them bottled up in there,
No problem.
As long as we keep up the presure…

lines: Looters scattered my cargo all over that farm.
I'd settle for my supplies and one day without goblins.
Bring my things back and I can keep these people fed.

defaultLines: Living out here toughens you up.
Watch out for wolves near the old road.
It's not safe to travel alone after dark.
I've been in these parts for years.
If you're heading east, be careful.
I've never seen humans from outside Wolf's End.
We thought we were alone.
Spent my whole life fearing goblins.
And worse things.
Can't even swim, what with the krakens.
The undead just keep rising from that crypt.
The old shrine up there is where the undead first came from.
They've been coming ever since.
I'll keep fighting them.
I'll never get used to their smell.
If you can help me destroy some of the worst of them…
We can keep them from spreading to Wolf's End.
You have my thanks.
But I'll never get used to them.
Or their smell.
Or the creepy things they say.
But mostly their smell.

lines: The old graveyard was bad enough before the bones started walking.
Something in that crypt keeps stirring them up.
Put the worst of them down and maybe the rest will remember they're dead.

defaultLines: We thought the beach goblins would finish us for sure.
Seeing a fresh face from the sea still feels like a miracle.
If you plan to stay, Wolf's End can use another brave soul.
We've fought the goblins for 50 years.
I thought other humans were a fairytale.
But you're real.
And you're really good at killing goblins.
I like that in a person.
Our village might be small, but we are strong.
The goblins have been more aggressive lately.
We need brave heroes to protect these lands.
I do what I can for the people here.
Stay a while, adventurer. You're safe here.
It cannot be! Has someone from the homeland finally returned to Ellyria?
I must get word to the king!
I'm amazed there are still humans here.
Thanks to hard fighters like Anna, we've held our own
Who are you? Where did you come from?
We came over with Sigismund Hocke fifty years ago.
I was a drummer boy in his army.
Part of an expedition to save his father's barony when the goblins invaded
Thanks to two generations of fighters like Anna.
But goblins surprised her on the beach.
Just over the hill there, an old smuggler's hideout.
Thank you for freeing Anna! Our fighters need their leader.
Yes, your sea captain has been telling me about the Goblin wars.
Fifty years ago we had Wolf's End Keep to protect us.
Sigismund Hocke built the keep as a base for his expedition.
But goblins and worse drove us out decades ago.
With your goblin-slaying skills…
Well, it's in pretty bad shape, just a ruin now.
If you can drive away the goblins, we'll help as best we can to rebuild it.
You cleared the old keep? Then it is yours. We will help make it a proper home again.
Some goblin merchants have moved into the smuggler’s cave.
They say they’re friendly goblin merchants.
Well, I don’t trust them.
Can you go see what they’re doing in that cave?
Hmm. Careful.
They’re tricky.
There really are nice goblins? Huh.
I suppose I’ll learn to like them.
That’s what you said last time.
You’re positive it’s the last Kraken?
Best prices in the realm!
Fresh goods, just arrived!
Can I interest you in something?
I have rare items from the east.
Business is good.
The goblins haven't gotten everything
I keep watch over the road at night.
Something stirs in the old ruins to the south.
Did you see those lights last night?
I used to be a soldier, you know.
Stay sharp, friend.
Had to stop our patrols.
Too many goblins...
Too many undead.
My Rangers would be slaughtered out there.
Someone named 'Nephit' is trying to control the goblins.
We've seen a lot of undead coming from the Tomb of the Slumbering King.
Baron Hocke employed the wisest men in the world for his research.
Someone named "Nephit" is trying to control the goblins and the undead.
My father read through the old reports from when we landed 50 years ago.
Nephit was one of the best. He was excavating a tomb when the goblins invaded.
Okay I'll meet you again when the dust settles.
You beat the big bad goblin? Nice work, champ!
With the Goblin Chief cut down, we can reclaim this land.
That piece of property by the river is lovely.
Maybe I'll build a house there.
Raise some sheep or something.
Or start an adventurer's guild.
Or maybe an inn.
It would be a nice place for a little keep.
I could be a Baroness.
Why not?

lines: If Nephit's moving the goblins, I want his name buried for good.
The old reports mention graves, kings, and a scholar who dug too deep.
When you're ready, I'll tell you what we found.

defaultLines: There is another tomb. Maybe what Nephit sought is in there.
Nephit might've wanted dragon bones.
The tomb is to the south, through the woods.
With Nephit driven off, maybe we'll have fewer undead and goblins both.
You said Nephit mentioned a "Dream Dragon."
This other tomb has been here longer than that.
Baron Hocke was obsessed with these old crypts.
The tomb is to the south, through the woods. If Nephit can rise a second time...
Clear a path and I'll follow.

lines: Another tomb means another secret Nephit wanted.
Whatever waits down there, it isn't sleeping peacefully.
If a dragon is involved, I'd rather hear about it from you than from rumors.

defaultLines: With Wolf's End secure, we can reclaim more of the land from evil.
We've got a lot of hard fighting ahead, but we can do it.
This whole land was once green pasture.
A dragon! Amazing, even if it’s only a kind of dream phantom.
Thanks to you, we're back on our feet and ready to fight!
Of course! Abbod's family is from the area to the East of here.
He's eager to reclaim his heritage.
I've never heard of them.
But the archives in the Citadel of Wissen might have some record.
I'll tell him as soon as I get back to town Champ.

lines: The east road is open, but that doesn't make it safe.
If you mean to carry this fight further inland, don't go alone.
Wolf's End can finally breathe, but only just.

defaultLines: Keep your guard up!
Again! With more feeling!
Pain is weakness leaving the body.
Focus on your breathing.
You have potential, recruit.
You've got a lot of potential, #tc#.
I've got an eye for this kind of thing.
Goblins stole all our horseshoes and made noserings.
The big goblins wear horseshoes as noserings.
If there were fewer goblins, we could reclaim this land.
I haven't seen the goblins this excited in years.
You're one tough goblin fighter.
This place might be saved yet.
I've been on duty for three days.
Goblins stole all our horseshoes and made noserings
To mock us, I think.
But we need horseshoes if we're going to rebuild our army and economy.
Thanks! I'll just get these rings cleaned off…
They're in a panic.
Probably because of you.

lines: If those goblins are wearing our horseshoes, bring them back.
Mockery is easier to stomach when you can melt it down afterward.
A working forge needs iron more than pride.
The fewer goblins between here and the hills, the better I sleep.
We've got land worth taking back if someone keeps clearing the pests.
Every goblin you drop buys this town another day.

defaultLines: The goblin shamans use their wands to control Death Eyes.
It will be nice not to have those evil things spying on us.
I hate the way those Death Eyes look at me.
Thanks again for your help.
If you bring me the wands of goblin shamans, I can use them to drive off Death Eyes.
Especially at night.
While we sleep.
Thanks! I should be able to ward off any Death Eyes with these.
Thanks again.
Wow,  you're a mighty goblin-slayer!
You're one tough goblin fighter.
This place might be saved yet.

lines: Those Death Eyes drift too close to town after dark.
A goblin shaman's wand might finally keep them off us.
I would love to sleep one night without glowing eyes at the window.
The goblins are getting reckless. That's when they make mistakes.
Push them harder and they'll break.
Fear travels fast through a raider camp.

Thanks for clearing the way!

There's a large force of goblins in those nearby tunnels.
What are they doing here, I wonder.
The Moai have awakened!
Removing that sword made these statues start talking!
They're ancient stone elementals, silenced by Meylour.
They say Meylour's cult is doing terrible things to our people.
Talk to the Moai.
Each one has revealed something important.
Those Moai spirits really hate Meylour.
The Gnole chief worships Meylour  on the mountain peak.
You can finish off the gnoles for good.
But you should know…
I believe Meylour has done something strange to the gnole leader.
Gnoles who live long enough can become monstrously powerful.
Meylour's followers are digging furiously into the mountain.
The goblins and cyclopses are digging away in the mountain.
There are some abandoned mines in the area.
The goblins are expanding them…
But they don't seem to be digging for gold.
No, they seem to have some Great Work in mind.
Known as the Veins of Meylour, these mines once belonged to the Earth Titan
Now Vezrinn's devotees have seized them
They seek the magic ore Alurite, and the Heart
You will need to defeat them all to seize the artifact and activate The Sword of Meylour
They seek the magic ore Alumite, and the Heart
Head down the first path east of here to get to the Emerald Glades
Keep heading east

I know where some of your kind were taken.

Meylour toppled us from our thrones.
If they live, they're in one of Meylour's foul shrines.
You must hurry, lest their time come.
If you would know your people's fate, you must confront them.
The Cyclopses were not always thus.
Meylour has corrupted their old forms.
They are his high priests and devoted acolytes.
Seek Meylour's secrets in their stronghold.
The gnoles turn to Meylour in desparation.
The gnoles normally have no love for gods.
But they hate humans for betraying them.
The humans of Felbridge were once their allies.
The Steward betrayed them.
Now they turn to Meylour for revenge.
Evil gods corrupt all.
Stormshard Mountains are too dangerous to go farther up
The expedition is up ahead.
Be careful, there are goblins everywhere.
There are goblins aplenty in the nearby caves.

Uthor's Exquisite Creations
Closed
Trespassers Will Be Annihilated

You can find noserings on the goblin Brutes.
I'll pay you well for them.

We can use it for enchanted weapons…
Enchanted armor…
Enchanted cookware…
Enchanted everything!
Felbridge will sparkle.
